action.reasoning: Observation: exprate improved to 0.0334 (val~0.0487 peak) after 50 epochs; debug shows exact matches on simple cases (2 6, \sqrt{4 8}) but errors on complex (wrong symbols, \mbox, numbers). Loss ~1.13, training stable. Analysis: attention+spatial ResNet works for basics but limited by low res (h=80 loses detail), exposure bias in greedy, moderate aug. Code was truncated previously but ran; higher res, stronger aug, grad clip, AdamW, tuned scheduler will boost symbol accuracy and structure. Decision: rewrite COMPLETE model.py (full classes+fixed generate with EOS stop, no truncation), COMPLETE train.py (higher res=160x1400, bs=24, aug+clip, 40 epochs, jsonl metrics, best on val_exprate), minor predict/debug updates for robustness; run full train+debug then submit_eval on best.pt.
